Task_Details: Create Python module to authenticate and search Pexels video API. Include error handling and rate limiting.

Write comprehensive documentation for Pexels and AE JSON modules with code examples.
Study Adobe UXP documentation and identify methods for programmatic project creation.
Create script to generate .prproj file with sequences and bins from blueprint JSON.
Add functionality to place markers at CTA positions and key moments in Premiere timeline.
Build function to automatically import downloaded B-roll into Premiere project bins.
End-to-end test: Blueprint → Premiere project with assets and markers.
Write user guide for Premiere Pro integration with troubleshooting section.
Set up Firecrawl MCP server and create functions to scrape competitor videos.
Create analyzer to extract engagement metrics and visual patterns from competitor videos.
Configure Supabase MCP server with database schema for blueprints and performance data.
Build system to log video performance metrics and link back to original blueprints.
Set up MiniMax MCP for AI asset generation (voiceover TTS image video).
Create workflow to generate custom assets when stock footage insufficient.
Comprehensive documentation for all MCP integrations and data tracking.
Set up MoviePy and create basic video assembly functions.
Create pipeline to combine B-roll text overlays and transitions into draft video.
Build system to generate quick preview video from blueprint for client review.
Build queue system for batch rendering multiple videos.
Create simple web UI for non-technical users to submit transcripts and download results.
Full test: Transcript input → Rendered video output with all integrations.
Complete system documentation including architecture diagrams and user manual.
Build Google Sheets tracking database with all required sheets and formulas.

Run first scheduled session manually to verify system works end-to-end.
